## Description
Provide a brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Breaking change

## The Four Tests Checklist
- [ ] **Designed**: ADR created for architecture changes?
- [ ] **Implemented**: Code cleanly uses SDK abstractions?
- [ ] **Measured**: Telemetry, benchmarks, or load tests run?
- [ ] **Operated**: Deployment / Chaos runbooks updated?
